title: HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: SALEM OFFICE HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligibility determination for Medicaid and SNAP, licensing of adult foster care homes, private and pre-admission nursing home assessments, Senior Peer Mentoring, and health and wellness programs. 3410 Cherry Avenue NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and people with physical disabilities age 18 and over Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 304-3420 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 304-3420 Main phone (800) 846-9165 Adult Protective Services (503) 304-3421 FAX (888) 370-4307 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 304-3420 Toll-free (800) 469-8772 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation via language line AREA SERVED: -Senior Peer Counseling: Clatsop, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties -All other services: Clatsop, Marion, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The two-story building is located just north of the intersection of Cherry Avenue NE and Salem Parkway. The entrance to the complex where the building is located is the first entrance north of Salem Parkway, on the east side of Cherry Avenue. Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Mentoring Programs * Older Adults Nursing Facility Referrals Wellness Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM OFFICE
